Episodes.Title: Hidden Inventory
Episodes.Actors: Ryan Bartley, Reba Buhr, Aya Endô
Episodes.Plot: Year 2006. Sorceress Utahime and Mei Mei are investigating a Western-style mansion that has a history. Suddenly, the building begins to collapse and they are thrown into the air.

Episodes.Title: Hidden Inventory: Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Naoki Bando, Seiyû Fujiwara, Yôko Hikasa
Episodes.Plot: Gojo and Geto are assigned the task of guarding and erasing a "Star Plasma Vessel" Riko Amanai when two groups try to get rid of her.

Episodes.Title: Hidden Inventory: Part 3
Episodes.Actors: Reba Buhr, Gakuto Kajiwara, Takehito Koyasu
Episodes.Plot: Gojo, Geto and Amanai rescue Kuroi. They then set off together to the island of Okinawa. However, back in Tokyo, the group is ambushed by somebody with only one goal - to prevent the fusion of Riko Amanai and Tengen.

Episodes.Title: Hidden Inventory: Part 4
Episodes.Actors: Aya Endô, Jun'ya Enoki, Hiroko Kiso
Episodes.Plot: "Let's go home, Riko-chan." The moment Geto extends a hand to Amanai, the worst that could possibly happen does. Geto is left dumbstruck as Toji Fushiguro makes his appearance. Toji then declares that he killed Satoru Gojo.

Episodes.Title: Premature Death
Episodes.Actors: Ryan Bartley, Aya Endô, Jun'ya Enoki
Episodes.Plot: Gojo becomes the strongest and starts handling missions alone. Geto feels lost while tirelessly exorcising and absorbing cursed spirits until another sorcerer appears, spreading her ideology on Geto.

Episodes.Title: It's Like That
Episodes.Actors: Masayuki Akasaka, Chinatsu Akasaki, Ray Chase
Episodes.Plot: After finishing a mission one day, Itadori decides to go to the movies, Kugisaki decides to go shopping, and Fushiguro goes home. After parting ways Kugisaki is approached by a woman who suddenly asks if she was with Itadori.

Episodes.Title: Evening Festival
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Chinatsu Akasaki, Kosuke Echigoya
Episodes.Plot: The fight between Mahito and Mechamaru continues. A few days later, on October 31, 2018, an unknown curtain is cast over Shibuya. The people trapped inside repeat only one thing: "Bring Satoru Gojo."

Episodes.Title: The Shibuya Incident
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Shigeru Chiba, Jun'ya Enoki
Episodes.Plot: Satoru Gojo enters Shibuya. The fight between the strongest sorcerer and the most evil curses begins. Meanwhile, Yuji works with Mei Mei and Ui Ui in order to get Yuji to be Gojo's backup as soon as possible.

Episodes.Title: Shibuya Incident - Gate, Open
Episodes.Plot: The battle between Gojo and the cursed spirits continues and reaches a climax with an unexpected arrival.

Episodes.Title: Pandemonium
Episodes.Plot: Gojo has been sealed in the Prison realm. It's time for the three sorcerer groups to enter Shibuya, save entrapped civilians and rescue Satoru Gojo.

Episodes.Title: Seance
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Lucien Dodge, Hiroya Egashira
Episodes.Plot: Team Nanami regroups with Yuji and formulate a plan to rescue Satoru Gojo. Yuji, Megumi and Takuma encounter a sorcerer capable of contacting the dead.

Episodes.Title: Dull Knife
Episodes.Actors: Robbie Daymond, Jun'ya Enoki, Wataru Hatano
Episodes.Plot: The curtain preventing the sorcerers from entering Shibuya Station is finally lifted and the teams can continue their rescue operation. However, with Ino heavily injured, Yuji and Megumi must split up. Nobara encounters a curse user.

Episodes.Title: Red Scale
Episodes.Actors: Robbie Daymond, Jun'ya Enoki, Youhei Hamada
Episodes.Plot: Yuji finally arrives at Shibuya Station, but is met with unexpected opposition.

Episodes.Title: Fluctuations
Episodes.Plot: As Mei Mei approaches Shibuya Station, Kenjaku meets her midway and calls out a special grade disease curse that she must defeat. Meanwhile, Naobito, Nanami and Maki encounter a curse.

Episodes.Title: Fluctuations - Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Shigeru Chiba, Robbie Daymond
Episodes.Plot: Nanami, Maki, and Naobito are driven to the edge after the Special-Grade Cursed Spirit, Dagon, activates his Domain Expansion. Fushiguro gives them a glimpse of a way to escape death, then Toji intrudes upon the fight.

Episodes.Title: Thunderclap
Episodes.Writer: Gege Akutami, Hiroshi Seko, Itsuki Tsuchigami
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Taito Ban, Ryan Bartley
Episodes.Plot: Megumi is overwhelmed by Toji's pure power as he attacks the young sorcerer. Meanwhile, Panda and Kusakabe get entangled in the battle between Jogo and Sukuna.

Episodes.Title: Thunderclap - Part 2
Episodes.Director: Hakuyu Go, Yamazaki Harumi, Itsuki Tsuchigami
Episodes.Actors: Kou Bonkobara, Ray Chase, Robbie Daymond
Episodes.Plot: In a desperate situation, Megumi forces Haruta into an unbeatable exorcism ritual against the out-of-control Mahoraga, his strongest shikigami, but Sukuna intervenes to ensure his plans with Megumi go on without any problems.

Episodes.Title: Right and Wrong
Episodes.Actors: Ray Chase, Shigeru Chiba, Lucien Dodge
Episodes.Plot: Yuji regains control of his body, only to witness the damage caused by Sukuna's merciless rampage. Meanwhile, Nanami, badly injured and delirious, confronts a group of transfigured humans and reunites with a familiar foe.

Episodes.Title: Right and Wrong - Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Azusa Aoi, Lucien Dodge, Jun'ya Enoki
Episodes.Plot: Yuji and Mahito's fight continues. However, Yuji is unaware that Mahito has already divided into two beings, one of which is battling Nobara elsewhere. He intends to use her to permanently crush Yuji's spirit.

Episodes.Title: Right and Wrong - Part 3
Episodes.Actors: Chinatsu Akasaki, Ryôta Asari, Lucien Dodge
Episodes.Plot: Yuji's determination falters when Mahito attacks Nobara, but just as things appear bleak, Yuji's best friend arrives, reigniting his spirit. Now all three go beyond their limits as they fight to kill.

Episodes.Title: Metamorphosis
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Jun'ya Enoki, Subaru Kimura
Episodes.Plot: Mahito's fight against Yuji and Todo continues. Thanks to everything that happened during his battle with these sorcerers, Mahito finally discovers the true nature of his soul and takes on a new deadly form.

Episodes.Title: Metamorphosis - Part 2
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Chinatsu Akasaki, Jun'ya Enoki
Episodes.Plot: The Shibuya incident is coming to an end and many groups of jujutsu sorcerers are getting ready for what may happen next. Meanwhile, Yuji's victory over Mahito is short-lived as the two are confronted by the mastermind behind ever...

Episodes.Title: Shibuya Incident - Gate, Close
Episodes.Actors: Adam McArthur, Aya Endô, Jun'ya Enoki
Episodes.Plot: The Shibuya Incident comes to a close. Yuki and Geto argue over their ideals of cursed energy. A long awaited sorcerer returns to the cursed filled Japan to execute.
